subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from Him Who was wronged, Who hath chosen tribulations in the path of God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, He migrated [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الذی اختار البلایا فی سبیل الله المهیمن القیوم انه هاجر فی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God
